events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 63rd birthday of the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, born in London on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music continues to inspire and move generations.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: June 25, 2026, marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop,' Michael Jackson, who passed away in Los Angeles on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: Michael Jackson Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music and groundbreaking artistry continue to resonate globally.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today, having been born Richard Starkey on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the one and only Ringo Starr, who turns 86 today! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today. He was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton Hill, Middlesex.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian May
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Sir Brian May! His guitar riffs have shaped rock history. What's your top Queen song?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today. He was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. Still rocking stages worldwide!

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: August 1, 2026, marks 45 years since MTV, Music Television, first launched, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' in 1981.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens and changed music forever. Remember the first video they played?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: August 29, 2026, marks 32 years since Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, a defining moment for Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, on a dairy farm in Bethel, New York, becoming a symbol of a generation.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis' passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll,' Elvis Presley, who passed away at his Graceland home in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since Elvis Presley left the building for the last time. His legacy lives on.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur was shot
events.blurb: September 7, 2026, marks 30 years since rapper Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in a drive-by in Las Vegas, passing away six days later on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac 30 Years
angles.copy: Three decades ago, we lost a lyrical genius. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music and culture.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away in London in 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years since we lost a true guitar visionary. His music still sounds as fresh as ever.

events.title: Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: September 26, 2026, marks 57 years since The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Still one of the most iconic album covers and tracklists of all time.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today. She was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and a voice that never quits.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today. He was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam Gallagher
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single turns 51
events.blurb: October 24, 2026, marks 51 years since John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was officially released in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a UK single. Its message is as powerful as ever.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled
events.blurb: October 23, 2026, marks 25 years since Apple unveiled the first iPod in 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled? It truly put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed everything.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the premiere date of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No,' in 1962.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and 64 years of iconic spy adventures.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' legendary co-founder, John Lennon, born in Liverpool on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision and music continue to inspire peace and imagination worldwide.
